title: No, artificial sweeteners do not cause cognitive decline
summary:
A Brazilian cohort study made headlines with claims artificial sweeteners cause cognitive decline, but the evidence it presents is weak at best.

The post No, artificial sweeteners do not cause cognitive decline appeared first on The Skeptic.
author: Mauro Proença
